# Ivory Note

> Ivory Note is an app for private, multilingual voice notes that turns lectures, meetings, interviews, and ideas into transcripts, summaries, study guides, and flashcards on device.

Ivory Note is a voice note and transcription app designed for students, privacy, and multi-device support. It emphasizes local storage, safer recovery for interrupted recordings, on-device transcription, and study tools such as summaries, study guides, and flashcards.

## Core Content

[Visit Ivory Note](https://useivory.app/)

### Features and Capabilities

- Private multilingual voice recording and transcription
- Lecture, class recording, club meeting, and interview capture
- On-device transcription and local storage for privacy
- Audio recovery for interrupted recordings
- Improved summaries, study guides, and flashcards
- Support across iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch
- Dark mode and light mode interfaces
- Notes organized by subject, class, idea, or source
- Quick recording from the device of choice
- No account required
- No ads
- Free to download from the App Store

### Platform Support

- iPhone: main interface for recording, search, and study tools
- iPad: larger workspace for review and transcripts
- Mac: notes management during research, writing, or planning
- Apple Watch: quick voice capture from the wrist

### Privacy and Data Storage

- No Ivory Note account is required
- Recordings and generated note content are stored locally
- Transcription runs on device using bundled speech technology
- Ivory Note does not operate a server that receives recordings or generated note content
- Users control deletion of recordings, notes, and app content

## Resources

[Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ivory-note/id6780518969)

[Release notes and version history](https://useivory.app/info#versions)

[Help and support](https://useivory.app/help)

[Privacy policy](https://useivory.app/privacy)

## Optional

### Future Ideas

- Deeper note search
- Export tools for transcripts and study materials
- Themed interfaces
- Siri and Shortcuts support
- Mac improvements

These are future ideas being explored, not guaranteed release promises.

### Additional Content

- User guides and tips
- Feature updates and roadmap notes through release notes
- Feedback and contact channels
